description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a series of large, round, light blue beads as its central decorative elements. The necklace is strung on a dark, braided cord, which provides both structure and contrast to the lighter beads. Two elongated, deep blue accent beads are positioned symmetrically on either side of the central section, separated by small white spacer beads. The overall design is balanced and visually striking, with a harmonious arrangement of colors and bead shapes. The necklace is displayed on a white bust stand, highlighting its drape and length. The materials appear to be a combination of polished stones or glass for the beads and synthetic fiber for the cord.
description: A beaded necklace with large light blue round beads, deep blue accent beads, and a dark braided cord. The design is symmetrical and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of blue beads, accent beads, and the braided cord.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the necklace and the thickness of the beads.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the braided cord encircling the back of the display bust, with no beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and bead arrangement from the opposite angle.
